original_goal: Phase 2C: Implement dev:prepare for commit preparation, rewrite deliver-milestone.js to consume canonical records, add delivery attempt records, ensure immutable commit throughout validation→delivery pipeline.
completed: Implemented dev:prepare: validates session closed, non-default branch, stages scoped files, commits, records preparedCommit/preparedBranch/preparedAt on milestone, verifies clean tree
Rewrote deliver-milestone.js: consumes milestone, validation, and closeout records; preflight checks branch/HEAD/fingerprint/clean tree/blockers/closeout/remaining work
Added delivery attempt records (development/delivery/<slug>.json): tracks push success/failure, PR success/failure, attempts history
Implemented idempotency: already-pushed commit treated as success, existing PR reused
Implemented failure safety: push/PR failures do not advance milestone state
Correct lifecycle: start → checkpoint → session:close → prepare → validate → complete → ready-for-delivery → push → draft PR
All existing tests pass (Phase 2B 44/44, reconciliation 14/14, schemas 27/27, lifecycle 23/23, controller 11/11)
remaining: Phase 3: HTML roadmap generator, session handoff generator, staleness monitor
next_required_action: Phase 3: HTML roadmap generator from canonical JSON state.
